validation_results.code_quality: High. Follows PEP 8, uses type hints, and leverages pathlib for robust path handling.

criteria_verification.notes: File exists with main() entry point and __main__ guard.
Recursive scanning of all status categories (backlog, in_progress, etc.) verified via tests.
Schema v1 JSON emitted with fixed key order and (status, id) sorting.
Missing fields are explicitly emitted as null.
Malformed frontmatter results in parse_error: true and ID derived from filename.
Positional TASK-ID argument works; unknown IDs exit 1 with stderr message.
21 unit tests cover all required scenarios.
All 21 tests passed in independent verification.
Code adheres to project linting and formatting standards.

rationale: The implementation fully satisfies all acceptance criteria. The code is robust, well-tested, and integrates correctly with existing utilities.
